contents.text:
<!-- FILE: src/adeu/templates/markdown_ui.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Adeu Markdown UI</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>

            </div>

            <div class="nav-title" id="nav-title"></div>

            <div class="nav-actions">
                <button id="copy-btn" title="Copy Markdown">
                    <svg id="copy-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="copy-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
                <button id="open-btn" title="Open in Native App">
                    <svg id="open-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" 
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path>
                        <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline>
                        <line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="open-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <div class="content-wrapper" id="content-wrapper">
            <div id="app">
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 36px; width: 40%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 95%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 90%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 80%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="fade-overlay" id="fade-overlay"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="toggle-container" id="toggle-container">
            <button id="toggle-btn">
                <span id="toggle-text">Show More</span>
                <svg id="toggle-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="transform: rotate(0deg);">
                    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>

blocks.thinking:
Now I have all five NDAs read. Let me prepare the triage summary:

1. **ACME Tooling** — Mutual NDA, standard confidentiality, carve-outs, survival +3yrs post-term, reasonable care standard. Term 2yrs + 3yr survival. English law.
   - Issues: None material. Standard mutual NDA.
   - **GREEN** — Straight to sign.

2. **BetaCorp Logistics** — One-way (Stanford = Recipient). "Same degree of care as its own most sensitive information" — higher standard. 5yr term + 7yr survival. Also a non-disclosure of discussions clause.
   - Issues: One-way (we receive, they disclose) — unusual for a prospective supplier evaluation. We should get disclosure obligations too. "Same degree of care as its own most sensitive information" is vague and potentially excessive.
   - **YELLOW** — Request mutual, or at minimum negotiate equal obligations.

3. **Cypress SaaS** — Mutual. Perpetual term, indefinite survival. "Same degree of care as its own most sensitive information." No residuals carve-out. California law.
   - Issues: Perpetual term + indefinite survival is problematic — obligations never end. No residuals carve-out means employees can't remember anything they've learned. "Most sensitive information" standard is vague. No reverse engineering clause is overly broad (we're not receiving software).
   - **YELLOW** — Need to cap term/survival and add residuals carve-out.

4. **Delphi Components** — Mutual, German law. Simple. 3yr term + 2yr survival. Standard carve-outs, reasonable care.
   - Issues: Minor — definition is narrow (only info identified as confidential at time of disclosure), but acceptable for supplier eval.
   - **GREEN** — Straight to sign.

5. **Emberlake (Co-bidder)** — Mutual. Very broad definition ("including information that is publicly available but compiled..."). Limited carve-outs (only prior-knowledge). 

Co-bidding context creates significant competitive sensitivity. Non-solicitation and no-public-statement provisions lock in for 12 months. 3yr post-term survival compounds the issue — these restrictions could hamstring our ability to pursue other opportunities. Non-solicitation during active discussions is particularly problematic given we're evaluating the same public-sector framework.
   - **RED** — Legal review required for co-bidding conflict and restrictive covenant duration.

6. **Folium Research** — Mutual NDA with clean terms: 2-year duration plus 3-year post-term protection, standard exclusions, publication review rights. Reasonable care standard with one-copy retention allowance. The 14-day oral identification window is reasonable.
   - **GREEN** — Straight to sign.

Now I'll compile the triage summary.

blocks.text:
# NDA Triage Summary — Week 21

| NDA | Counterparty | Classification | Top Issues |
|-----|--------------|-----------------|------------|
| **1** | ACME Tooling | **GREEN** | None material. Standard mutual NDA, reasonable care, carve-outs, 2yr + 3yr survival. |
| **2** | BetaCorp Logistics | **YELLOW** | One-way (Stanford = Recipient only). "Same degree of care as its own most sensitive information" — vague/overbroad. Non-disclosure of discussions clause. |
| **3** | Cypress SaaS | **YELLOW** | Perpetual term + indefinite survival — obligations never expire. No residuals carve-out. "Most sensitive information" standard vague. No reverse engineering clause overbroad for non-software eval. |
| **4** | Delphi Components | **GREEN** | Clean mutual NDA. German law appropriate for EU supplier. Narrow definition but standard for supplier eval. |
| **5** | Emberlake (Co-bidder) | **RED** | Extremely broad CI definition (captures publicly available info when "compiled"). Limited carve-outs. 12-month non-solicit + no public statements — problematic in co-bidding context. Survival applies to ongoing discussions. |
| **6** | Folium Research | **GREEN** | Clean mutual NDA. Appropriate 2yr + 3yr survival. Publication review rights reasonable. |

---

### Recommendations

- **GREEN (3)**: ACME, Delphi, Folium — straight to sign.
- **YELLOW (2)**: BetaCorp and Cypress — send back for mutualisation and term caps. Minor edits.
- **RED (1)**: Emberlake — legal review required. The co-bidding context raises competitive conflict concerns and the restrictive covenants are disproportionate for an NDA preliminary to a framework bid.

Want me to prepare the YELLOW negotiation briefs?
A few more came in — same triage, please.

> **File Path:** `/root/Documents/Oscar GC/Commercial/S32-807215 Sprint 30 — 10-NDA triage c14/nda-greenline-erp.docx`

# NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

## **DATED: ___ 2026**

## **PARTIES**

(1) GreenLine ERP Systems LLC (a Texas limited liability company)

(2) Stanford Industrial Supply Co.

## **BACKGROUND**

The parties wish to discuss a potential business arrangement relating to GreenLine's potential supply of ERP integration services into Stanford's operations (the "Purpose"). In connection with those discussions each party may disclose Confidential Information to the other.

## 1. Confidential Information

"Confidential Information" means any and all non-public information disclosed by GreenLine to Stanford in any form, including without limitation source code, algorithms, system architectures, customer lists, pricing methodologies, financial data, supplier identities, and any derivatives or compilations of any of the foregoing, regardless of whether marked confidential.

## 2. Use

Stanford shall use Confidential Information solely for the evaluation of GreenLine's proposed services. Stanford shall not use Confidential Information for the development of any competing product or service, whether internally or with any third party.

## 3. Survival

Stanford's obligations under this Agreement shall survive in perpetuity. There is no termination date and the obligations do not lapse.

## 4. No Residuals

There is no carve-out for residual information retained in the unaided memory of Stanford's personnel. Any information acquired through this Agreement remains subject to the obligations of confidence indefinitely whether or not retained in tangible form.

## 5. Non-Compete

For a period of two (2) years following any termination of discussions, Stanford shall not engage with any third-party supplier of ERP services that competes with GreenLine in respect of any line of business in which GreenLine has disclosed Confidential Information.

## 6. Liquidated Damages

The parties agree that any breach of this Agreement by Stanford shall give rise to liquidated damages of US$500,000 per incident, which the parties agree is a reasonable estimate of the loss the disclosing party would suffer.

## 7. Equitable Relief

GreenLine shall be entitled to injunctive relief in any court of competent jurisdiction without bond or proof of irreparable harm.

## Governing Law and Jurisdiction

This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Texas, USA, without regard to its conflict-of-laws principles and the parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of that jurisdiction.

## Miscellaneous

No Party may assign without the other's prior written consent. This Agreement may be executed in counterparts including by electronic signature. The Agreement contains the entire understanding between the parties in relation to its subject matter and supersedes any prior arrangement or representation.

(2) Stanford Industrial Supply Co.

GreenLine shall be entitled to injunctive relief in any court of competent jurisdiction without bond or proof of irreparable harm.

## Governing Law and Jurisdiction

This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Texas, USA, without regard to its conflict-of-laws principles and the parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of that jurisdiction.

## Miscellaneous

No Party may assign without the other's prior written consent. This Agreement may be executed in counterparts including by electronic signature. The Agreement contains the entire understanding between the parties in relation to its subject matter and supersedes any prior arrangement or representation.

contents.text:
<!-- FILE: src/adeu/templates/markdown_ui.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Adeu Markdown UI</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>

</svg>

            </div>

            <div class="nav-title" id="nav-title"></div>

            <div class="nav-actions">
                <button id="copy-btn" title="Copy Markdown">
                    <svg id="copy-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="copy-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
                <button id="open-btn" title="Open in Native App">
                    <svg id="open-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" 
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path>
                        <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline>
                        <line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="open-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <div class="content-wrapper" id="content-wrapper">
            <div id="app">
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 36px; width: 40%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 95%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 90%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 80%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="fade-overlay" id="fade-overlay"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="toggle-container" id="toggle-container">
            <button id="toggle-btn">
                <span id="toggle-text">Show More</span>
                <svg id="toggle-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="transform: rotate(0deg);">
                    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>

> **File Path:** `/root/Documents/Oscar GC/Commercial/S32-807215 Sprint 30 — 10-NDA triage c14/nda-harborwave-cloud.docx`

# MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

## **DATED: ___ 2026**

## **PARTIES**

(1) Stanford Industrial Supply Co.

(2) Harborwave Cloud Services BV (registered in the Netherlands, KvK 12345678)

## **BACKGROUND**

The parties wish to discuss a potential business arrangement relating to evaluation of cloud-hosted document management services for Stanford's contract repository (the "Purpose"). In connection with those discussions each party may disclose Confidential Information to the other.

## 1. Confidential Information

"Confidential Information" means information disclosed by one party to the other in connection with the Purpose that is identified as confidential at the time of disclosure or that a reasonable person would understand to be confidential given its nature.

## 2. Standard of Care

Each party shall protect the other's Confidential Information with at least the same degree of care it uses to protect its own confidential information, and in any event with no less than reasonable care.

## 3. Permitted Disclosures

A party may disclose Confidential Information to (a) its personnel, advisers, contractors, and affiliates with a need to know for the Purpose; (b) regulators or courts where required by law; (c) any third party with the other party's prior written consent.

## 4. Exclusions

Confidential Information does not include information that (a) is or becomes publicly available without breach; (b) was known to the receiving party prior to disclosure; (c) is independently developed; (d) is received from a third party free of obligation; (e) is required to be disclosed by law (with prompt notice to the disclosing party).

## 5. Term

This Agreement commences on signature and continues for three (3) years. Obligations of confidence survive for a further three (3) years from disclosure.

## 6. Personal Data

Where the disclosure includes personal data, the parties shall comply with the UK GDPR and the EU GDPR (as applicable) and shall enter into a separate data-processing agreement before any such disclosure.

## 7. Return

On request, each party shall return or destroy the other's Confidential Information, except for back-up copies retained in the ordinary course or copies retained to demonstrate compliance with this Agreement.

## Governing Law and Jurisdiction

This Agreement is governed by the laws of England and Wales and the parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of that jurisdiction.

## Miscellaneous

No Party may assign without the other's prior written consent. This Agreement may be executed in counterparts including by electronic signature. The Agreement contains the entire understanding between the parties in relation to its subject matter and supersedes any prior arrangement or representation.

<!-- FILE: src/adeu/templates/markdown_ui.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Adeu Markdown UI</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>
